name: ai-dlp
description: AI-DLP: prompt-time Data Loss Prevention for generative AI.

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @wyloc/gateway
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @wyloc/detector && npm run build -w @wyloc/sql-masker -w @wyloc/code-masker -w @wyloc/browser-extension --if-present
scripts.build:gateway: npm run build -w @wyloc/detector && npm run build -w @wyloc/sql-masker -w @wyloc/code-masker && npm run build -w @wyloc/gateway
